Members

Currently, IS2 Lab is actively looking for self-motivated PostDoc/PhD/Master/RA/interns with competative salaries. Feel free to drop an email with CV to Prof. Wang if you are interested.

Faculty: Prof. Jingyi Wang

PhD students:

  • Xiangshan Gao, 2018 Fall, B.E., Xidian University, Co-supervision with Prof. Cheng
  • Shunkai Zhu, 2019 Fall, B.E., Xidian University, Co-supervision with Prof. Cheng
  • Jialuo Chen, 2020 Fall, B.E., Zhejiang University, Co-supervision with Prof. Cheng
  • Huan Sun, 2020 Fall, B.E., Hefei University of Technology, Co-supervision with Prof. Wang
  • Xiangxiang Chen, 2021 Fall, B.E., Xi’an Jiaotong University
  • Xiaoxia Liu, 2022 Fall, B.E., Jilin University
  • Xuran Li, 2022 Fall, B.E., Tongji University

Master students:

  • Huizhong Guo, B.E., Zhejiang University, 2021 Fall
  • Fan Zhou, B.E., Shandong University, 2021 Fall
  • Ziyu Mao, B.E., Shandong University, 2022 Fall

Alumni:

  • Tinglan Peng, B.E., ZJU, FYP 2021, 3rd author of IEEE S&P 2022, now in industry

  • Zhang Liyi, B.S., Uni. of Waterloo, Research Assistant, now Master in Uni. of Waterloo
